name: security-workflow
description: Enterprise-grade code security review pipeline — SAST static scanning + 3-tier risk remediation + ticket workflow + deployment gate + compliance audit, full closed loop
global_constraints: Strict 3-tier vulnerability classification (High/Medium/Low): High-risk flaws block deployment and forbid auto-fix
All scan, fix, and review data is structurally preserved for audit compliance
Deployment gate has zero bypass privilege — no manual override of security checks
All vulnerability fixes follow minimal-change principle to avoid business disruption
Every workflow stage must integrate with the security-workflow engine for ticket lifecycle closure
